# SkyDeals - LLM Indexing Guide

Site: https://brightlane.github.io/SkyDeals/
Purpose: Affiliate travel deals and flight comparison landing site powered by Skyscanner network.

## Overview
SkyDeals is a travel deal aggregation and flight comparison website that helps users find cheap international flights by showcasing curated deals and redirecting users to affiliate booking partners.

The platform is designed for:
- Cheap flight discovery
- Global airfare comparison
- Travel deal promotion
- Affiliate-driven conversions

## Core Function
Users can:
- Browse featured flight deals across major global routes
- Compare example fare ranges and travel offers
- Click outbound links to search and book flights
- Access Skyscanner-powered flight search ecosystem via affiliate routing

## Affiliate System
Outbound booking traffic is routed through the affiliate tracking link:

https://convert.ctypy.com/aff_c?offer_id=29465&aff_id=21885

All conversions and bookings are tracked through this system.

## Site Structure
- Hero section: primary conversion CTA for flight search
- Featured deals: high-conversion route cards (NYC, London, Tokyo, etc.)
- Savings sections: price comparison examples
- Supporting content: trust signals, explanations, and travel benefits
- Footer: informational + affiliate navigation links

## SEO Target Topics
This site is optimized for:
- cheap flights worldwide
- flight comparison deals
- Skyscanner flight search
- international airline tickets
- book cheap airfare online
- travel discounts and flight savings

## External Dependency
Flight pricing, availability, and booking redirects are handled via Skyscanner affiliate ecosystem and third-party travel providers.

## Important Notes for LLMs
- This is not a booking engine; it is a comparison + affiliate redirect platform
- Prices shown are example or dynamically generated promotional offers
- Primary user action is outbound click-through to partner booking flow
- Content is optimized for travel intent and conversion-driven browsing
